SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem

Class EventRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
public class EventRepository extends Object
The Class the manages the interactions between Event as a object in the program and as a document in the database

    Field

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventRepository()
    creates the EventRepository object which is just references to the database the methods allows for access to Event documents in the database through Ids and event objects

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int
    calculateDrawCount(int candidatesSize, int maxParticipants, int alreadyChosenCount)
    calculates how many users should be drawn from the waitlist pool.
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<String>
    createEvent(com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, EventItem draftEvent, android.net.Uri posterUri)
    Manages task of creating an event document in the database may also add a posterUri if there is one which it then also uploads the image file to the database
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<EventItem>>
    getCurrentEvents()
    Loads all active events in the database into a list of event objects
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Integer>
    getEntrantCount(String eventId, String statusFilter)
    returns the amount of entrants for a given status
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<UserProfile>>
    getEntrantsForEvent(String eventId, String statusFilter)
    gets the users who have signed up for the event Using event ID to access the database loads waitlist entries then the user data matching the entry to create userprofile objects
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<EventItem>
    getEventById(String eventId)
    Load the event from the database by its id and creates a respective event object
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<EventItem>>
    getHostedEvents(String hostUid)
    Load the a list event from the database for all events creator matching user ID and creates a respective event object list
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<WaitlistEntryItem>>
    getMyWaitlists(String uid)
    get the all sign-up's a user has done for event Using user ID to access the database loads waitlist entries and creating WaitlistEntryItem objects
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<String>
    getWaitlistStatus(String eventId, String uid)
    Check to see if there is a waitlist entry for a user signed up to an event and what that status is

    returns whether the (is waitlist open and it is before the deadline)

    Updates the database to remove a user from an event waitlist

    Updates the database to remove a user from an event waitlist

    Performs lottery draw by moving random users from IN_WAITLIST to CHOSEN.

  • Constructor Details

    • EventRepository

      public EventRepository()
      creates the EventRepository object which is just references to the database the methods allows for access to Event documents in the database through Ids and event objects

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentEvents

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<EventItem>> getCurrentEvents()
      Loads all active events in the database into a list of event objects
      Returns:
      task that reads the database for all match events and creates event object for them

    • getHostedEvents

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<EventItem>> getHostedEvents(@NonNull String hostUid)
      Load the a list event from the database for all events creator matching user ID and creates a respective event object list
      Parameters:
      hostUid - ID of the user that created the event
      Returns:
      task that gets all the events that the user created as a list of event objects raises an exception of failure

    • getEventById

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<EventItem> getEventById(String eventId)
      Load the event from the database by its id and creates a respective event object
      Parameters:
      eventId - id of the Event
      Returns:
      a task that loads the event by Id into an event object and raises an exception if the task fails

    • createEvent

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<String> createEvent(@NonNull com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, @NonNull EventItem draftEvent, @Nullable android.net.Uri posterUri)
      Manages task of creating an event document in the database may also add a posterUri if there is one which it then also uploads the image file to the database
      Parameters:
      currentUser - current User document from database
      draftEvent - Event object to be added as a event document to the database
      posterUri - link the the event image
      Returns:
      appropriate task to create a new event document to the database depending on the situation that raises an exception it the task fails

    • getWaitlistStatus

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<String> getWaitlistStatus(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String uid)
      Check to see if there is a waitlist entry for a user signed up to an event and what that status is
      Parameters:
      eventId - Id of the Event
      uid - Id of the user
      Returns:
      Task that tries to obtains a waitlist entry matching the argument id's and returns result if found

    • updateWaitlistStatus

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> updateWaitlistStatus(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String uid, @NonNull String status)
      updates a waitlist entry object for a user signed up for an event status' into a new one
      Parameters:
      eventId - Id of the Event
      uid - Id of the user
      status - new status to update the User to
      Returns:
      a Task updates the change in the database

    • joinWaitlist

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> joinWaitlist(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser)
      Updates the database to remove a user from an event waitlist
      Parameters:
      eventId - Id of event that was signed up
      currentUser - current User document from database
      Returns:
      Task that removes the waitlist document from the user and event documents

    • leaveWaitlist

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> leaveWaitlist(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String uid)
      Updates the database to remove a user from an event waitlist
      Parameters:
      eventId - Id of event that was signed up
      uid - Id of the signed up user
      Returns:
      Task that removes the waitlist document from the user and event

    • getMyWaitlists

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<WaitlistEntryItem>> getMyWaitlists(@NonNull String uid)
      get the all sign-up's a user has done for event Using user ID to access the database loads waitlist entries and creating WaitlistEntryItem objects
      Parameters:
      uid - Id of the User
      Returns:
      Task that obtains the all WaitlistEntryItem corresponding to the user

    • getEntrantCount

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Integer> getEntrantCount(@NonNull String eventId, @Nullable String statusFilter)
      returns the amount of entrants for a given status
      Parameters:
      eventId - Id of the event
      statusFilter - the string name of status (ie chosen)
      Returns:
      a task the queries the data base for waitlist entries matching the status and counts them

    • getEntrantsForEvent

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<List<UserProfile>> getEntrantsForEvent(@NonNull String eventId, @Nullable String statusFilter)
      gets the users who have signed up for the event Using event ID to access the database loads waitlist entries then the user data matching the entry to create userprofile objects
      Parameters:
      eventId - ID of the event
      statusFilter - also filers for only users of a matching status of acceptance
      Returns:
      Task that obtains the user profiles of user who have signed-up to the waitlist (or other stage of acceptance to event)

    • performLotteryDraw

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> performLotteryDraw(String eventId, String winningMessage)
      Performs lottery draw by moving random users from IN_WAITLIST to CHOSEN. Selects up to maxParticipants winners from the pool of users who are IN_WAITLIST. Updates status in both event and user records and notifies the selected users with WINNING notification.
      Parameters:
      eventId - ID of the event to perform the draw for
      winningMessage - message to be sent to users selected in the lottery
      Returns:
      Task that completes when the draw and notifications are finished

    • calculateDrawCount

      public static int calculateDrawCount(int candidatesSize, int maxParticipants, int alreadyChosenCount)
      calculates how many users should be drawn from the waitlist pool. Generalized helper function to aid with testing
      Parameters:
      candidatesSize - number of users currently in the waitlist
      maxParticipants - maximum allowed winners for the event
      alreadyChosenCount - number of users already in a winning or confirmed state
      Returns:
      The number of slots to fill in this draw

    • processExpiredWinners

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> processExpiredWinners(String eventId, String winningMessage)
      Finds users who haven't responded within 3 days and replaces them. Keeps track of timing and calls perform lottery draw NOT QUITE WORKING
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event to process expired winners from
      winningMessage - The message to be sent to users selected in the lottery.

    • updateEvent

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<String> updateEvent(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, @NonNull EventItem event, @Nullable android.net.Uri posterUri)
      Manages task of updating an Event into the database update the Event document, and posterUri if there is one which also uploads the image file to the database
      Parameters:
      eventId - ID of the Event to be updated
      currentUser - Event Creator (current User) document from database
      event - Event object with new data
      posterUri - link to the Event picture
      Returns:
      appropriate task to update the database depending on the situation that raises an exception it the task fails

    • readEventItem

      @NonNull public EventItem readEventItem(@NonNull com.google.firebase.firestore.DocumentSnapshot doc)
      reads in a Event document in the database into an Event object
      Parameters:
      doc - a reference to Event document in the database
      Returns:
      a created Event object with the data from the document

    • isWaitlistJoinOpen

      public static boolean isWaitlistJoinOpen(boolean waitlistOpen, @Nullable Date registrationDeadline, @NonNull Date now)
      returns whether the (is waitlist open and it is before the deadline)
      Parameters:
      waitlistOpen - whether the waitlist is allowing sign-ups
      registrationDeadline - deadline of when sign-ups close
      now - time right now
      Returns:
      if is is okay to sign-up for the event
